sizing_rule.note: Allocate to non-interest-bearing cash reserves alongside optimal f allocation across multiple market systems to buffer worst-case drawdowns. Example: 60% system A + 40% system B + cash buffer. Cash allocation acts as drawdown protection even when optimal f alone suggests full deployment.

source_rule_text: Diversification across multiple market systems should include allocation to non-interest-bearing cash to buffer drawdowns, even when optimal f suggests otherwise.
